message:
Command `# The IPs moved to /nc/ip/ - find all NC IPs
ls /nc/ip/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check NC_AES
find /nc/ip -name "nc_aes.v" 2>/dev/null | head -3
# Check CF_SRAM
find /nc/ip -name "CF_SRAM*" 2>/dev/null | head -3
find /nc -name "CF_SRAM_1024x32.v" 2>/dev/null | head -3` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# The IPs moved to /nc/ip/ - find all NC IPs
ls /nc/ip/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check NC_AES
find /nc/ip -name "nc_aes.v" 2>/dev/null | head -3
# Check CF_SRAM
find /nc/ip -name "CF_SRAM*" 2>/dev/null | head -3
find /nc -name "CF_SRAM_1024x32.v" 2>/dev/null | head -3"}

extras.command:
# The IPs moved to /nc/ip/ - find all NC IPs
ls /nc/ip/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check NC_AES
find /nc/ip -name "nc_aes.v" 2>/dev/null | head -3
# Check CF_SRAM
find /nc/ip -name "CF_SRAM*" 2>/dev/null | head -3
find /nc -name "CF_SRAM_1024x32.v" 2>/dev/null | head -3
